title: Immigrate to B.C.
content:
Immigrate to B.C.
Discover ways to immigrate to British Columbia, Canada as a worker, recent graduate, entrepreneur, or business.
About the BC PNP
Find important information about the BC Provincial Nominee Program, including draws, documents, and more.
Learn about the BC PNP
For workers
Learn about pathways to permanent residency as a worker.
See if you are eligible
For entrepreneurs and businesses
Learn about pathways to permanent residency as an entrepreneur or business.
See if you are eligible
For employers
Understand what you need to support your employee’s BC PNP application.
See employer requirements
For nominees
Find out what supports are available to you as a provincial nominee.
Learn about post-nomination support
